new_tasks.title: Review volunteer leave recording options from Access Group
new_tasks.description: Simon Burford has raised a call with Access Group to get confirmation in writing about options for allowing employees to record volunteer leave in PeopleXD. This follows up on the earlier concern Matt Thomas raised about staff inability to log volunteering hours. Kevin needs to review the Access Group response once received.
new_tasks.email_subject: Recording volunteer leave on PeopleXD by Employees
